'''gazhoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:practicalizer|practicalizer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-zh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:practicalizer|practicalizer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gazhoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæzheteth|gæzheteth]] || [[word:gæzhetej|gæzhetej]] || [[word:gæzhetesh|gæzhetesh]] || [[word:gæzhete|gæzhete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gazhozhototh|gazhozhototh]] || [[word:gazhozhotoj|gazhozhotoj]] || [[word:gazhozhotosh|gazhozhotosh]] || [[word:gazhozhoto|gazhozhoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gazhototh|gazhototh]] || [[word:gazhotoj|gazhotoj]] || [[word:gazhotosh|gazhotosh]] || [[word:gazhoto|gazhoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gazhoftoth|gazhoftoth]] || [[word:gazhoftoj|gazhoftoj]] || [[word:gazhoftosh|gazhoftosh]] || [[word:gazhoftof|gazhoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gazhototho|gazhototho]] || [[word:gazhotojo|gazhotojo]] || [[word:gazhotosho|gazhotosho]] || [[word:gazhotoko|gazhotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gazhototh|gazhototh]] || [[word:gazhotoj|gazhotoj]] || [[word:gazhotosh|gazhotosh]] || [[word:gazhoto|gazhoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gazhotothol|gazhotothol]] || [[word:gazhotojol|gazhotojol]] || [[word:gazhotoshol|gazhotoshol]] || [[word:gazhotokol|gazhotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gazhotothotho|gazhotothotho]] || [[word:gazhotojojo|gazhotojojo]] || [[word:gazhotoshosho|gazhotoshosho]] || [[word:gazhotoko|gazhotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gazhotothon|gazhotothon]] || [[word:gazhotojon|gazhotojon]] || [[word:gazhotoshon|gazhotoshon]] || [[word:gazhotokon|gazhotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gazhotothoro|gazhotothoro]] || [[word:gazhotojoro|gazhotojoro]] || [[word:gazhotoshoro|gazhotoshoro]] || [[word:gazhotokoro|gazhotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
